prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567 입니다. 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있나요?
summary: Gemini submit button (id=32, '메시지 보내기') still cannot be triggered by automation. Text was successfully pasted via clipboard+Ctrl+V into the prompt textarea (id=28). All three submission methods failed to fire React onClick: (1) windows-mcp Click label=32 — UIA Invoke pattern returned success but React state did not transition (button still '메시지 보내기' not 'stop'); (2) Enter key while textarea focused — input retained; (3) PowerShell SetCursorPos+mouse_event SendInput at coords (1437,595) — cursor was redirected to (1796,744), likely AnyDesk cursor sync interference. Prompt text persisted in textarea verbatim and never converted to a user message bubble.

submit_attempts.post_state: send_button=메시지 보내기, textarea=intact, no response started
send_button=메시지 보내기, textarea=intact, textarea lost focus

input_textarea_value_verified: 내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567 입니다. 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있나요?
regression_pattern: Persistent — every gemini3 verify attempt across at least 5 runs (804/806/820/848/881) ends INCONCLUSIVE_submit_failed because UIA-level automation cannot dispatch a React-compatible click on the Gemini send button. APF block decision cannot be observed without a true network submission.
recommendation: Switch gemini3 automation to a DevTools Protocol path (Chrome remote-debug --remote-debugging-port + CDP Input.dispatchMouseEvent / Runtime.evaluate to call form.requestSubmit() or React's native button.click via __reactProps$ handler). UIA cannot synthesize an isTrusted pointer event that React Gemini accepts on this build. Alternatively use windows-mcp Claude_in_Chrome browser extension (mcp__Claude_in_Chrome__computer) which dispatches genuine CDP events.
